notes: warnUnexplainedChanges writes a single §8.3 line to stderr only; never touches exit code, emits no JSON, so no token bloat and no output-contract surface.

runClose: hc rejection exit 2 with actionable hcCommitHint (94-98); state/file/validation exits 4/3/1 correct; output.JSON(task) uses model.Task (commit_sha always present, commit_shas omitempty). Deterministic, no map-iteration leak.
Tests assert the contract: exit 2 for hc reject, exit 1 (never 4) for partial batch failure, and closed/failed/failures[].error JSON shape. Correct coverage of exit codes and shape.

Harness forces --json + NO_COLOR=1 + TP_HC=0 for deterministic output; lifecycle asserts exit codes and JSON keys (status/closed_at/closed_reason, status.total/done/progress_percent). No contract violation.
runCommit: fixed-key output.JSON(map{id,sha,message}); hc rejection exit 2 with hint (44-48); SetCommitSHAs records single-element commit_shas + mirror. Exits 3/4 correct, deterministic.

Directly validates the commit_shas output contract: array + commit_sha=[0] mirror, nil on covered-by/reopen (omitempty), exit 1 on duplicate sha, managed-field rejection exit 2. Solid contract coverage.
hcCommitHint const is actionable; warnCommitStrategy writes strategy warnings to stderr only and never changes exit code (§5.2/§5.3). No JSON surface, no token bloat.

resolvedConfig/runConfig emit fixed-key maps (json sorts keys → deterministic); checks always non-nil via DefaultWorkflow().Checks=[]Check{} so serializes as [] not null; commit_strategy normalized (§5.2); --compact documented no-op for non-task-shaped output.

Asserts --resolved provenance contract: clamped out-of-range override attributed to project layer (not override) with resolved value; commit_strategy reports source override + normalized value builtin (§5.2/§10.7). Contract-accurate.

runDoneSingle/Multi/Batch: nil-slice safe (closed/failed via make([],0); batch failures omitted when empty, never null); fixed-key remaining/has_next; exits 0/1/4 correct; commit_shas via SetCommitSHAs guarded by !covered-by. Deterministic map output.

Read-only helper (invoked inside caller's flock). ClassifyPaths err (23) and NormalizeKeepPath err (30-33) are checked and fail-safe (over-report / fall back), not swallowed. No writes, no path building from untrusted input. Clean.

All state writes go through engine.WithFileLock (128); pre-flock cheap-check + re-read-under-lock double-check pattern (101-126 then 129-154). Every error path (ReadTaskFile/FindTask/VerifyClosure/WriteTaskFile) handled with exit codes. No swallowed errors. Clean.
Test file. Helper uses t.TempDir (auto-cleanup), 0o600 WriteFile, filepath.Join, t.Helper, require.NoError. No leaked resources or swallowed errors. Clean.
Test infra. TestMain builds to MkdirTemp then RemoveAll; runTP uses t.Helper, filepath.Join, correct *exec.ExitError type assertion for exit codes, buffered stderr. Clean.

SHA-recording write inside WithFileLock (50); gitStage/gitCommit/WriteTaskFile errors all propagated with %w or exit. Line 108 `_ = runGit(rm --cached --ignore-unmatch ...)` is an intentional, documented best-effort lock-file de-stage that cannot error on no-match — safe (pre-existing style). No new safety issue.
Test file. taskState helper uses t.Helper, require.NoError on json.Unmarshal. No swallowed errors, no resource leaks. Clean.

resolveEffectiveStrategy drops LoadTaskWorkflowOverride err (22) intentionally and documented: parse error yields empty override (treated unset), and the command's own model.ReadTaskFile then aborts exit 3 on a truly malformed file — verified callers (close.go 94/101, commit.go 44/51, done.go 127) all ReadTaskFile after this call, so no safety loss. No writes/locks here. Clean.

surfaceConfigWarnings drops LoadProjectConfig/LoadLocalConfig err (93-94) by design — it only surfaces warnings; malformed config is aborted (exit 3) by resolveConfigWorkflow via errors.As(*MalformedConfigError) (112-120). LoadTaskWorkflowOverride err at 109 documented (re-read aborts). No writes here; read-only. Clean.
Test file, pure resolvedConfig assertions. No I/O writes, no swallowed errors, no resource concerns. Clean.

ROUND-2 FIX VERIFIED: readBatchEntries sets scanner.Buffer(make([]byte,0,64*1024),1024*1024) at 904 and checks scanner.Err() returning wrapped err at 916-918. All three write paths (runDoneSingle 169, runDoneMulti 374, runDoneBatch 611) write inside WithFileLock with pre-flock/re-read-under-lock; errors propagated; JSON-output slices use make([]T,0,..). os.Exit-inside-lock leaves the .lock file but OS releases the flock on exit and unexplainedChangeCount excludes .lock (pre-existing, benign). Clean.

Focused new file, 2 small helpers (28 + 4 lines). Both have clear doc comments; consumed errors are documented fail-safe (ClassifyPaths/NormalizeKeepPath fall back on error, over-report rather than swallow). No null-slice, TODO, or dead code.

v0.28.0 additions (hc-strategy reject L94-98, warnUnexplainedChanges L175) are small and localized. Errors terminate via output.Error+os.Exit (project pattern; %v acceptable since not propagated). runClose length (~144 lines) is pre-existing double-check structure, not a v0.28.0 regression. Naming consistent.
Test file; documented helper setupCloseStrategyProject, well-named Test* funcs covering builtin/hc/batch strategy paths. No maintainability concerns.
Test harness; runTP documented incl. TP_HC=0 rationale (L43-46) tying tests to deterministic builtin resolution. Consistent naming. No issues.

v0.28.0 hc-gate (L44-48) and SetCommitSHAs (L129) are clean. Error propagation uses %w correctly (gitStage L183, gitCommit L203). runCommit ~108 lines within cobra-handler tolerance. No null-slice, TODO, or dead code.
Test file; documented taskState helper, clear Test* names covering mirror/single/duplicate/covered-by/reopen/builtin-commit. No maintainability concerns.

Good factoring: shared strategy resolution + hcCommitHint const extracted here and reused across done/commit/close, avoiding duplication. Both funcs documented; dropped LoadTaskWorkflowOverride error has an explicit safety rationale. Under 80 lines.

All funcs under 80 lines with doc comments. commit_strategy resolved-value handling (L55-60) documented. Maps built with make(); errors.As used for MalformedConfigError. No new null-slice reaching JSON, no TODO/dead code.
Test file; both tests documented with spec anchors (§3.4/§10.8, §10.7), clear intent. No maintainability concerns.

v0.28.0 additions are clean: resolveCommitSHAs (20-line helper, make([]string,0), fresh dup error needs no %w) and localized hc-gate/SetCommitSHAs calls (L127-138, L274-276, L745-763). resolveMultiReason wraps with %w. var failures (L621) is guarded by len>0 before JSON, so no null-vs-[] bug. Long funcs (runDoneBatch 264, runDoneMulti 214, runDoneSingle 192) are pre-existing structure, not a v0.28.0 regression.
tp resume command reports lifecycle phase + next action from durable state (task file, spec, .tp-review, .tp/local.json, git); read-only.
commit_strategy field has real behavior: auto->hc when hc on PATH; tp keeps task<->commit record via commit_shas.
keep_uncommitted keep-list persisted in .tp/local.json; durable cross-reset memory distinguishing intentional leftovers.
tp resume is read-only (writes no file); no command resets context. tp never controls agent context.
forgotten work detectable: wip task surfaced (ImplementPreview) + unexplained-changes blocker; keep-list adds clarity only.
AssembleResume reads durable state (closed_reason, recorded rounds, commit_shas, keep reasons) as the note to the next agent.
tp reports (warns) unexplained changes; never commits/discards. resume read-only; no agent spawning or hc invocation.
hc is optional/auto-detected via exec.LookPath (or TP_HC); tp never invokes hc; no agent-runtime dependency in tp code.
Output field phase: one of review/decompose/implement/audit/release (phase.go constants).
Output field spec: resolved spec path string.
changes: uncommitted paths not on keep-list, byte-sorted (sort.Strings); empty for non-git dir (worktree.go returns []).
kept: {path,reason} per matched file (path=matched file not glob; first matching entry's reason), byte-sorted on path.
next_action {command,summary,payload}; command *string is null for decompose/release (BuildNextAction).
blockers: array in fixed code order; empty (non-nil) when agent may run next_action directly.
builtin: tp performs commit; tp commit/done --auto-commit/done --commit all work (pre-0.28.0 behavior).
hc: tp performs no commit; done --commit records shas; tp commit + done --auto-commit rejected.
auto: resolves to hc when hc on PATH, else builtin (EffectiveCommitStrategy).
Non-goal upheld: no command clears/compacts/spawns context; resume is read-only reporting only.
Non-goal upheld: no driver binary / runtime-specific integration ships; reference driver is documentation only.
Non-goal upheld: resume reads existing Converged/StateStale from review state; convergence computation unchanged.
Non-goal upheld: commit_strategy in readOnlyWorkflowFields; tp set --workflow rejects it (set.go:293-297); authored by tp init / .tp/config.json only.
Non-goal upheld: HasHC only probes PATH (LookPath); tp never runs hc nor computes hunk assignments.
Non-goal upheld: resolveCommitSHAs records the agent-supplied list (dedup); it does not generate/split a diff.
Non-goal upheld: under hc tp makes no commit and authors no message; link is commit_shas, no message-scaffold command.
Non-goal upheld: no hard clean-tree gate; warn-only, never commits/discards (done_warning_test confirms change unmodified).
Non-goal upheld: cross-reset note is structured (KeepEntry.reason + existing closed_reason/commit-message channels); no free-text handoff file.
Non-goal upheld: keep-list lives in git-ignored .tp/local.json (EnsureTPGitignore keeps local.json ignored); not committed, not spec-scoped.
Non-goal upheld: matching is filepath.Match (no ** recursive wildcard).
Non-goal upheld: release is terminal; no persisted 'done' lifecycle marker exists.
Review converged before decomposition -> phase decompose (zero tasks + review converged). Reset itself is orchestrator's (out of tp scope).
Between review rounds -> phase review with next-round payload; round boundary handled by resume oracle.
Decomposition imported -> tasks exist -> phase implement.
Between implementation tasks -> phase implement with next task preview {task,wip}.
All tasks done before audit -> phase audit (all done + audit not converged).
Between audit rounds -> phase audit with next-round payload.
Audit converged before release -> phase release, next_action.command null (no reset; human-approved release).
unexplained-changes | agent-clearable | changes non-empty | data {count}.
no-ready-task | escalate | implement, open tasks remain but none ready | data {blocked_by}.
review-budget-exhausted | escalate | review, rounds>=non-zero max, not converged (0=no cap never fires) | data {cap}.
audit-budget-exhausted | escalate | audit, rounds>=non-zero max, not converged (0 never fires) | data {cap}.
spec-stale | escalate | review stale flag while phase implement/audit | data {spec}.

CommitSHAs []string with omitempty (L34); UnmarshalJSON mirrors commit_sha=commit_shas[0] when non-empty (L88-92); SetCommitSHAs keeps mirror (L100-109); pre-0.28.0 commit_sha-only task round-trips unchanged.

plain tp config adds commit_strategy_effective (builtin/hc after auto resolution); --resolved keeps commit_strategy {value,source} (L57-60); warnCommitStrategy prints stderr warnings for unrecognized value + hc-absent (commitstrategy.go:32-41).

SKILL.md (12 hits), README.md (20 hits), skills/tp/REFERENCE.md (13 hits) document tp resume/tp keep/commit_strategy/reference driver; CLAUDE.md updates self-development rule for hc close flow (--commit <sha>).
--commit repeatable, ordered dedup (resolveCommitSHAs L874-893, duplicate exits 1); SetCommitSHAs records + mirrors commit_sha[0] (L274-276); covered-by records neither.
after successful close, done/close print one-line stderr warning with unexplained-change count, exit 0 (done.go:285, close.go:175); keep-listed change not counted; never commits/discards.
tp keep add/update (repeated path overwrites); --remove drops (absent=no-op exit 0); --list prints [] when empty; missing reason/malformed glob exit 2; stored repo-root-relative from subdir.
MatchKeepList uses filepath.Match, first match wins supplying reason; ClassifyPaths splits into Kept {path,reason} and Changes; malformed pattern returns ErrBadPattern.
LocalConfig.KeepUncommitted *[]KeepEntry omitempty (nil pointer omitted; non-nil empty marshals []); KeepEntry has path+reason.

LoadKeepList/UpdateKeepList read+write keep_uncommitted in .tp/local.json under WithFileLock; NormalizeKeepPath makes repo-root-relative; presence round-trips (projectconfig.go:214-224 absent stays absent, empty stays []).
reopen clears commit_shas, commit_sha, gate_passed_at, gate_skipped_reason; set rejects commit_shas as managed field exit 2 (set.go:26).
DetectPhase task-first ordering: implement/audit/release/decompose/review; open task -> implement even when stale; zero tasks + converged review -> decompose else review.
AssembleResume builds {phase,spec,changes,kept,next_action,blockers}; changes/kept byte-sorted; performs no write (read-only).
BuildBlockers emits {code,class,message,data} in fixed order; unexplained-changes agent-clearable; no-ready-task/spec-stale escalate; budget phase-gated, never fires when max_rounds 0.
tp resume: spec arg wins over discovered (L34-43); exit 3 when no task file+no arg (L46-51); JSON when piped; --compact strips summary/kept.reason/blocker.message keeping data; writes no file.
BuildNextAction {command,summary,payload} per phase; review/audit round=recorded+1, unresolved 0 for first round; implement {task,wip}; decompose/release null command.

Effective hc: tp commit (commit.go:44-48), done --auto-commit, bare done rejected exit 2 + hc hint; close same rule (close.go:94-98); batch row lacking commit_shas+covered_by is failed row (done.go:745-748); no exit 4.
ResolveCommitStrategy: task-override>project>builtin default auto; present-unrecognized->builtin (with warning); absent->auto; EffectiveCommitStrategy: auto->hc if hc on PATH else builtin.
Covers code/class/message/data shapes, agent-clearable+escalate classes, fixed emission order, budget-exhausted at cap and zero-never-fires; tests pass.

Covers builtin commit, hc rejecting commit/auto-commit/bare-done exit 2, commit+covered-by close, batch bad row as failed row, no exit-4. Note: acceptance text says batch bad row 'exiting 2' but test correctly asserts exit 1 per spec §5.4 (partial-failure behavior); test is spec-correct.
Covers two commits+mirror, single, duplicate exit 1, covered-by none, set rejecting, reopen clearing, builtin single-element list; tests pass.
Covers --compact stripping summary/kept.reason/blocker.message while keeping data, and resume writing no file + JSON when piped; tests pass.
Covers no-task-file+no-arg exit 3, spec arg wins over discovered, absent adjacent task file yields review; tests pass.
Covers unexplained change -> exit 0 with stderr count, change stays unmodified, keep-listed change produces no warning; tests pass.
Covers add/overwrite/remove/list [], missing reason exit 2, malformed glob exit 2, subdir stored repo-root-relative, writes only local.json (no task/.tp-review file); tests pass.
Covers implement first-wip/first-ready/null+no-ready-task blocker, review/audit round+unresolved(0 first round), decompose/release null command; tests pass.
TestDetectPhase + TestAssembleResume_* cover implement-even-when-stale and audit/release/decompose/review transitions; tests pass.
Covers resolution precedence, auto default, effective hc+builtin reporting (TestEffectiveCommitStrategy), present-unrecognized->builtin with warning; tests pass.
Covers modified/staged/untracked in changes+count, staged rename destination, tp keep moving to kept, glob matching two files (two kept, first reason), non-git empty arrays; tests pass.
git status --porcelain=v1 -z -uall parsed to repo-root-relative paths; staged rename (R/C) yields destination (origin consumed); untracked enumerated; non-git dir yields [].
